Member.title: Member
Member.description: A user of the Coop Finance system.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching their Firebase Auth UID.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

capital_share.description: The total capital share balance of the member.

loan_balance.description: The total outstanding loan balance of the member.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the member was created.

SourceFund.title: Source Fund
SourceFund.description: A source of liquidity (e.g., BANK or HAND).

id.description: The unique identifier of the source fund.

balance.description: The current balance of the source fund.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the balance was last updated.

MasterNode.title: Master Node
MasterNode.description: A high-level accounting category (e.g., LENDING, INCOME, EXPENSES, CAPITAL).

id.description: The unique identifier of the master node.

balance.description: The current balance of the master node.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the balance was last updated.

NodeRegistry.title: Node Registry
NodeRegistry.description: A specific category mapped to a Master Node.

id.description: The unique identifier of the node category.

name.description: The display name of the node category.

parent_master_node.description: The master node this category rolls up to.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the node category was created.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A financial transaction in the system.

id.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

type.description: Whether money is coming in or going out.

node_category.description: The specific node category for this transaction.

parent_master_node.description: The master node this transaction rolls up to.

member_id.description: The UID of the member this transaction is associated with.

status.description: The current status of the transaction.

created_by.description: The UID of the user who created the transaction.

verified_by.description: The UID of the admin who verified or rejected the transaction.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created.

verified_at.description: The timestamp when the transaction was verified or rejected.

members/{uid}.description: Stores user profiles and their individual balances.

source_funds/{fundId}.description: Stores the balances of the main liquidity sources (BANK, HAND).

master_nodes/{nodeId}.description: Stores the aggregated balances of the high-level accounting categories.

node_registry/{categoryId}.description: Stores the specific categories that map to Master Nodes.

transactions/{transactionId}.description: Stores all financial transactions, including pending, verified, and rejected ones.
